title: RaLP
description: RaLP (Register and Login Plugin) is a must-have security plugin for Minecraft servers, offering a seamless yet powerful authentication system to prevent unauthorized access.
body:
RaLP (Register and Login Plugin) is a must-have security plugin for Minecraft servers, offering a seamless yet powerful authentication system to prevent unauthorized access. Key Features: - Secure Registration & Login – Players must register with a password and log in to play - Password Hashing – Uses BCrypt for maximum security (no plaintext passwords!) - Anti-Bruteforce Protection – Blocks players after too many failed attempts (Except mod) - Auto-Login – Optional auto-login for trusted devices (Except mod) - Multi-Language Support – Built-in translations (English, Russian, German, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Turkish, Italian, Polish) - Session Management – Auto-logout after inactivity (Except mod)
Commands (Plugin) 1. /login 2. /l 3. /register 4. /reg 5. /autologin 6. /ralp reload 7. /changepassword 8. /unreg
Commands (Mod) 1. /login 2. /register 3. /ralp (set/help/reload) 4. /changepassword 5. /unreg
